{"dialect":"mysql","upstream_node":"Create","sql":"CREATE TABLE orders (id INT, order_date DATE) PARTITION BY RANGE (YEAR(order_date)) (PARTITION p2023 VALUES LESS THAN (2024), PARTITION p2024 VALUES LESS THAN (2025), PARTITION pmax VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE))","want":"CREATE TABLE orders (id INT, order_date DATE) PARTITION BY RANGE (YEAR(order_date)) (PARTITION p2023 VALUES LESS THAN (2024), PARTITION p2024 VALUES LESS THAN (2025), PARTITION pmax VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE))","want_ast":"Create(\n  this=Schema(\n    this=Table(\n      this=Identifier(this=orders, quoted=False)),\n    expressions=[\n      ColumnDef(\n        this=Identifier(this=id, quoted=False),\n        kind=DataType(this=DType.INT, nested=False)),\n      ColumnDef(\n        this=Identifier(this=order_date, quoted=False),\n        kind=DataType(this=DType.DATE, nested=False))]),\n  kind=TABLE,\n  replace=False,\n  refresh=False,\n  unique=False,\n  exists=False,\n  properties=Properties(\n    expressions=[\n      PartitionByRangeProperty(\n        partition_expressions=[\n          Year(\n            this=TsOrDsToDate(\n              this=Column(\n                this=Identifier(this=order_date, quoted=False))))],\n        create_expressions=[\n          Partition(\n            expressions=[\n              PartitionRange(\n PartitionRange(\n                this=Identifier(this=p2024, quoted=False),\n                expressions=[\n                  Literal(this=2025, is_string=False)])]),\n          Partition(\n            expressions=[\n              PartitionRange(\n                this=Identifier(this=pmax, quoted=False),\n                expressions=[\n                  Var(this=MAXVALUE)])])])]),\n  concurrently=False)","ast_divergence":"MySQL date-function args are not wrapped in the deferred TsOrDsToDate node (this port elides that wrap consistently for all MySQL date functions; see generator/dialect_funcs.go). The CREATE parses to the full structured PartitionByRangeProperty and round-trips to identical SQL; only the incidental partition-expression function-arg shape differs from the Python oracle."}
{"dialect":"mysql","upstream_node":"Create","sql":"CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, sale_date DATE) PARTITION BY RANGE (MONTH(sale_date)) (PARTITION q1 VALUES LESS THAN (4), PARTITION q2 VALUES LESS THAN (4), PARTITION q2 VALUES LESS THAN (7), PARTITION q3 VALUES LESS THAN (10), PARTITION q4 VALUES LESS THAN (13))","want_ast":"Create(\n  this=Schema(\n    this=Table(\n      this=Identifier(this=sales, quoted=False)),\n    expressions=[\n      ColumnDef(\n        this=Identifier(this=id, quoted=False),\n        kind=DataType(this=DType.INT, nested=False)),\n      ColumnDef(\n date functions; see generator/dialect_funcs.go). {"dialect":"postgres","upstream_node":"Create","sql":"CREATE TABLE t (i INT, EXCLUDE USING btree(INT4RANGE(vid, nid, '[]') ASC NULLS FIRST WITH &&) INCLUDE (col1, col2))","want":"CREATE TABLE t (i INT, EXCLUDE USING btree(INT4RANGE(vid, nid, '[]') ASC NULLS FIRST WITH &&) INCLUDE (col1, col2))","want_ast":"Create(\n  this=Schema(\n    this=Table(\n      this=Identifier(this=t, quoted=False)),\n    expressions=[\n      ColumnDef(\n        this=Identifier(this=i, quoted=False),\n        kind=DataType(this=DType.INT, nested=False)),\n      ExcludeColumnConstraint(\n        this=IndexParameters(\n          using=Var(this=btree),\n          columns=[\n            WithOperator(\n              this=Ordered(\n                this=Anonymous(\n                  this=INT4RANGE,\n                  expressions=[\n                    Column(\n                      this=Identifier(this=vid, quoted=False)),\n                    Column(\n                      this=Identifier(this=nid, quoted=False)),\n                    Literal(this='[]', is_string=True)]),\n                desc=False,\n                nulls_first=True),\n              op=Var(this=&&))],\n          include=[\n            Identifier(this=col1, quoted=False),\n            Identifier(this=col2, quoted=False)],\n          with_storage=False))]),\n  kind=TABLE,\n  replace=False,\n  refresh=False,\n  unique=False,\n  exists=False,\n  concurrently=False)"}
{"dialect":"postgres","upstream_node":"Create","sql":"CREATE TABLE t (i INT, EXCLUDE USING gin(col1 WITH &&, col2 WITH ||) USING INDEX TABLESPACE tablespace WHERE (id > 5))","want":"CREATE TABLE t (i INT, EXCLUDE USING gin(col1 WITH &&, col2 WITH ||) USING INDEX TABLESPACE tablespace WHERE (id > 5))","want_ast":"Create(\n  this=Schema(\n    this=Table(\n      this=Identifier(this=t, quoted=False)),\n    expressions=[\n      ColumnDef(\n        this=Identifier(this=i, quoted=False),\n        kind=DataType(this=DType.INT, nested=False)),\n      ExcludeColumnConstraint(\n        this=IndexParameters(\n          using=Var(this=gin),\n          columns=[\n            WithOperator(\n              this=Ordered(\n                this=Column(\n                  this=Identifier(this=col1, quoted=False)),\n                nulls_first=False),\n              op=Var(this=&&)),\n            WithOperator(\n              this=Ordered(\n                this=Column(\n                  this=Identifier(this=col2, quoted=False)),\n                nulls_first=False),\n              op=Var(this=||))],\n          where=Where(\n            this=Paren(\n              this=GT(\n                this=Column(\n                  this=Identifier(this=id, quoted=False)),\n                expression=Literal(this=5, is_string=False)))),\n          with_storage=False,\n          tablespace=Var(this=tablespace)))]),\n  kind=TABLE,\n  replace=False,\n  refresh=False,\n  unique=False,\n  exists=False,\n  concurrently=False)"}
{"dialect":"postgres","upstream_node":"Create","sql":"CREATE TABLE t (i INT, PRIMARY KEY (i), EXCLUDE USING gist(col varchar_pattern_ops DESC NULLS LAST WITH &&) WITH (sp1=1, sp2=2))","want":"CREATE TABLE t (i INT, PRIMARY KEY (i), EXCLUDE USING gist(col varchar_pattern_ops DESC NULLS LAST WITH &&) WITH (sp1=1, sp2=2))","want_ast":"Create(\n  this=Schema(\n    this=Table(\n      this=Identifier(this=t, quoted=False)),\n    expressions=[\n      ColumnDef(\n        this=Identifier(this=i, quoted=False),\n        kind=DataType(this=DType.INT, nested=False)),\n      PrimaryKey(\n        expressions=[\n          Identifier(this=i, quoted=False)],\n        include=IndexParameters(with_storage=False)),\n      ExcludeColumnConstraint(\n        this=IndexParameters(\n          using=Var(this=gist),\n          columns=[\n            WithOperator(\n              this=Ordered(\n                this=Opclass(\n                  this=Column(\n                    this=Identifier(this=col, quoted=False)),\n                  expression=Table(\n                    this=Identifier(this=varchar_pattern_ops, quoted=False))),\n                desc=True,\n                nulls_first=False),\n              op=Var(this=&&))],\n          with_storage=[\n            Property(\n              this=Var(this=sp1),\n              value=Literal(this=1, is_string=False)),\n            Property(\n              this=Var(this=sp2),\n              value=Literal(this=2, is_string=False))]))]),\n  kind=TABLE,\n  replace=False,\n  refresh=False,\n  unique=False,\n  exists=False,\n  concurrently=False)"}

&&))","want":"CREATE TABLE t (vid INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT ht_vid_nid_fid_idx EXCLUDE (INT4RANGE(vid, nid) WITH &&, INT4RANGE(fid, fid, '[]') WITH &&))","want_ast":"Create(\n  this=Schema(\n refresh=False,\n  unique=False,\n  exists=False,\n  concurrently=False)"}

{"dialect":"postgres","upstream_node":"Create","sql":"CREATE UNLOGGED TABLE foo AS WITH t(c) AS (SELECT 1) SELECT * FROM (SELECT c AS c FROM t) AS temp","want":"CREATE UNLOGGED TABLE foo AS WITH t(c) AS (SELECT 1) SELECT * FROM (SELECT c AS c FROM t) AS temp","want_ast":"Create(\n  this=Table(\n    this=Identifier(this=foo, quoted=False)),\n  kind=TABLE,\n  replace=False,\n  refresh=False,\n  unique=False,\n  expression=Select(\n    expressions=[\n      Star()],\n    from_=From(\n      this=Subquery(\n        this=Select(\n          expressions=[\n            Alias(\n              this=Column(\n                this=Identifier(this=c, quoted=False)),\n              alias=Identifier(this=c, quoted=False))],\n          from_=From(\n            this=Table(\n              this=Identifier(this=t, quoted=False)))),\n        alias=TableAlias(\n          this=Identifier(this=temp, quoted=False)))),\n    with_=With(\n      expressions=[\n        CTE(\n          this=Select(\n            expressions=[\n              Literal(this=1, is_string=False)]),\n          alias=TableAlias(\n            this=Identifier(this=t, quoted=False),\n            columns=[\n              Identifier(this=c, quoted=False)]))])),\n  exists=False,\n  properties=Properties(\n    expressions=[\n      UnloggedProperty()]),\n  concurrently=False)"}
